channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] US announces another troop death as Israel warns Tehran's attacks are coming close
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — The United States announced another death of a service member as it launched more airstrikes at Iran on Sunday in response to the killing of U.S. troops, and Iran fired missiles toward Jordan that risked widening the conflict into neighboring Israel. Step by step, the U.S. and Iran have [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US service member killed in Iraq during 'controlled detonation' of Iranian drone, military says
item.description: One U.S. service member was killed and another wounded Saturday in northern Iraq during a "controlled detonation" of a downed Iranian attack drone, U.S. Central Command announced Sunday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Dozens rally in downtown Tampa demanding justice after ICE shootings in Maine and Texas
item.description: Protesters gathered at Tampa City Hall Sunday to call for justice following two fatal ICE-related shootings this past week in Maine and Houston.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] One dead after car found inside pond in Pinellas Park: FHP
item.description: Officials pulled a truck out of a pond in Pinellas Park Sunday afternoon.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] ‘She never came out’: North Port couple mourns dog lost in camper fire

[FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Win or lose, World Cup sparks lasting soccer growth across Tampa Bay
item.description: For the past five weeks, the FIFA World Cup has done something remarkable: it has brought people together, turning total strangers into passionate fans and transforming local cities into one big community.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] BREAKING: Principal releases statement after calls of gunshots at Booker High School campus
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Tropical Depression Two continues to be monitored as it moves through the area, bringing rain.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Mamdani says he’s still looking into arresting Netanyahu if Israeli leader visits New York
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said his office is still looking into arresting Benjamin Netanyahu if the Israeli prime minister visits the city for the UN General Assembly in September.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Polk County firefighters battle fire at Battery USA in Lakeland: PCFR
item.description: Polk County Fire Rescue said it was working to extinguish a commercial structure fire on Combee Road in Lakeland. The building was a Battery USA store.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Troopers arrest motorcyclist after fiery I-75 pursuit in Hillsborough County: FHP
item.description: Florida Highway Patrol (FHP) troopers arrested a motorcyclist early Sunday morning after a fiery pursuit on Interstate 75 in Hillsborough County, according to a news release.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Chill out this summer with the Nueva Cantina frozen menu and cool food offerings
item.description: A local Mexican street taquería is cooling down the summer heat with a dedicated seasonal drink and food menu running through August. Raul Medina of Nueva Cantina shared details about the custom themes that his scratch kitchen is bringing to guests.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] 3 rescued after mayday call as boat takes on water
